first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The scores are the same (9/10), and the justifications, strengths, and concerns all highlight the same key points: extensive experience, direct alignment with AI agent infrastructure work, a strong primary tech stack match, and concerns about the lack of Nest.js and confusing future employment dates. Minor differences in wording and the specific secondary technology mentioned as a concern (Kotlin vs. Vitest/Jest) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and show no connection to the demographic change.
